org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 ModuleBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<ModuleConfig,ModuleBuilder>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ModuleBuilder

  • public class ModuleBuilder
extends AbstractBuilder<ModuleConfig,ModuleBuilder>
    This is a builder for build ModuleConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
